microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's **resilience validation program** from a 2-person operation into a platformized system, standardizing operational readiness workflows to sustain 45+ annual drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise customers including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led 0→1 development of an internal **Resilience Automation Platform**, defining product requirements and self-service scheduling capabilities that reduced operational toil by 30% and transitioned drill execution to a scalable, repeatable model.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive **chaos and load testing** capability — a rack-level drill program delivered in 4 months with a 94% recovery rate — surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a new continuous validation standard.

Directed 14 cross-org **incident readiness** executions under executive visibility, including serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a **$1.5B+ enterprise contract**, coordinating SRE and platform engineering partners.

Built an internal AI agent and restructured planning workflows to cut **drill planning cycle time by 39%** and increase capacity by 21%, using outcome metrics to iterate on the program rather than over-planning up front.
microsoft_2023: Championed **product adoption** for AI-driven code generation workflows, conducting user demos and training sessions that drove utilization across 14 key Azure service teams and saved **37 engineering hours monthly**.

Shaped the product roadmap to include intent-based YAML generation by facilitating 11+ discovery interviews with Azure service teams, translating ambiguous engineer pain points into **concrete feature requirements** with clear scope and success metrics.

Improved **observability and retrieval** for internal documentation by implementing rigorous metadata standards and migrating content to an AI-powered semantic search platform, cutting lookup time by **83%**.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework across 140+ teams, directly reducing time-to-production for critical infrastructure.

Conducted discovery with 20+ service teams to identify **81 hours of manual toil per region launch**, then built a roadmap to automate critical paths — translating systems data into a prioritized investment plan for leadership.

Engineered a **Power BI reliability dashboard** to track operational toil and automation coverage across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to surface gaps and target high-impact investments with measurable outcomes.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot OS migration by defining the transition strategy, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations, and establishing production readiness criteria before each rollout phase.

Drove cross-functional alignment between IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and reducing on-call toil for the platform team.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, prioritizing the backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilize the developer intake process across distributed engineering teams.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by redesigning end-to-end scoping and invoicing workflows for 200+ monthly proposals through a new CRM process, improving operational reliability and reducing manual errors in the sales pipeline.

Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost by **13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a data-informed go-to-market strategy, optimizing web and search presence using performance signals to guide iteration.

Improved leadership pricing models by conducting profitability analysis across **1,000+ project records**, identifying margin leaks and translating financial signals into actionable roadmap recommendations.
